acceptance.assertion: Ein Regressionstest reproduziert den beobachteten Fall: sicherer Bureau-Checkout-Dry-Run besteht, Apply scheitert heute vor Wirkung mit Bureau and non-Bureau resources must be acquired separately.
Der Cleanup erwirbt oder sequenziert Bureau- und Nicht-Bureau-Ressourcen ausschließlich in vom autoritativen Lease-Vertrag erlaubten, getrennten Schritten.
Apply bleibt an plan_id, expected_plan_sha256, expected Head/Branch und die exakte Confirmation remove-linked-checkout gebunden.
Recovery-Refs, Archivmanifest, Grace, Fremd-Worktree-Schutz, Dirty-State- und Koordinationsprüfungen bleiben fail-closed erhalten.
Tests decken erfolgreiche Bureau- und Nicht-Bureau-Cleanups sowie verbotene gemischte Acquire-Versuche ab.

goal: grabowski_checkout_cleanup so härten, dass ein sicherer archivierter Bureau-Worktree nach erfolgreichem plan- und headgebundenem Dry-Run angewendet werden kann, ohne Bureau- und Nicht-Bureau-Ressourcen in einem verbotenen gemeinsamen Lease-Acquire zu mischen oder bestehende Fail-closed-Grenzen abzuschwächen.

does_not_establish: permission to weaken Bureau lease isolation
permission to bypass cleanup dry-run or archive grace
exact root cause beyond the observed mixed resource-class acquire path
metadata.manual_fallback: Cleanup wurde sicher in getrennte, exakt ressourcengebundene Worktree- und Branch-Schritte zerlegt; dies behebt nicht den Werkzeugfehler.
metadata.observed_error: Bureau and non-Bureau resources must be acquired separately
metadata.source: Live RepoGround T008 cleanup readback through Grabowski.

live_proof.outcome: Bureau checkout archived successfully after separated Bureau/non-Bureau acquisitions; physical removal remained blocked by the required 24-hour grace.

verified_acceptance.reproduce: PASS: the original mixed-acquire failure was reproduced and covered before the fix.
verified_acceptance.resource-purity: PASS: checkout operations partition Bureau and non-Bureau keys and acquire each pure group sequentially.
verified_acceptance.plan-binding: PASS: cleanup continues to require dry-run plan_id, expected_plan_sha256, expected identity and exact confirmation.
verified_acceptance.safety-preserved: PASS: central mixed-acquire rejection remains unchanged; partial acquisition rolls back; archive grace remained active in the live proof.
verified_acceptance.bureau-and-non-bureau-tests: PASS: tests cover successful Bureau cleanup, direct mixed-acquire rejection and rollback after later-group failure.

metadata.verification_note: Acceptance closed from exact merged implementation, exact-head validation and task-bound machine evidence; no inferred green state.

title: Bureau-Checkout-Cleanup ressourcenrein sequenzieren
